accounts.name: adjacency_set
docs: Optional: adjacency set for validating adjacency when not first claim.

accounts.name: adjacent_hex
docs: Optional: an adjacent hex owned by the player, for adjacency proof.

accounts.name: valid_hex_set
docs: The primary ValidHexSet chunk (chunk 0). Must have data.

accounts.name: adjacency_set
docs: The primary AdjacencySet chunk (chunk 0). Must have data.

accounts.name: nft_token_account
docs: The player's token account holding the NFT.

errors.name: MapNotFinalized
errors.msg: Map data has not been finalized

errors.name: AlreadyJoined
errors.msg: Player has already joined this season

errors.name: InvalidHex
errors.msg: Hex is not in the valid hex set

errors.name: EdgeNotInChunk
errors.msg: Edge not found in the provided adjacency chunk

errors.name: NotHexOwner
errors.msg: Caller does not own this hex

errors.name: CommitmentLocked
errors.msg: Commitment is locked due to active attack

errors.name: CommitmentExists
errors.msg: Hex already has a defence commitment

errors.name: InvalidNonce
errors.msg: Nonce does not match expected commitment_nonce

errors.name: AttackDuringLandRush
errors.msg: Attacking is not permitted during Land Rush

errors.name: HexUnderAttack
errors.msg: Hex already has a pending attack

errors.name: OccupationShieldActive
errors.msg: Hex is within occupation shield window

errors.name: CombatCooldownActive
errors.msg: Hex is within combat cooldown window

errors.name: BelowMinAttackEnergy
errors.msg: Energy committed is below minimum attack energy

errors.name: InvalidRecipient
errors.msg: Recipient wallet does not match stored owner

errors.name: VictoryNotReached
errors.msg: Player's points are below the victory threshold

errors.name: NftNotOwned
errors.msg: Wallet does not hold the specified NFT

errors.name: MapAlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: Map data has already been finalized

errors.name: RecoveryTooEarly
errors.msg: Recovery cannot be claimed within 24 hours of timeout

errors.name: RecoveryAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Recovery has already been claimed for this hex

errors.name: InitialNonceMismatch
errors.msg: Initial nonce does not match player.commitment_nonce

errors.name: SeasonNotInCombatPhase
errors.msg: Season is not in a combat phase

errors.name: RetaliationTargetMismatch
errors.msg: Retaliation token target does not match hex owner

errors.name: StandingDownRequiresPlayer
errors.msg: Standing Down requires a target player

errors.name: TheatreWindowTooShort
errors.msg: Theatre window is not in the future

errors.name: NotAuthorisedToReveal
errors.msg: Caller is not authorised to reveal

types.name: Edge
docs: Stored as (hex_a, hex_b) where hex_a < hex_b.

fields.name: admin
docs: Authority for creating seasons and updating config.

fields.name: season_counter
docs: Incrementing counter for unique season IDs.
